content: مِش اِلمُدير قاَلَك تَعَمَل شُغل؟ قاَعِد مَ تِعَمَل شَ حَاجَة ليه؟

transcriptions.arabizi: mish ilmudeer 'ael|ak taAamil shughl? 'aeAid ma|tiAamil|shahaega leeh?

relationships: eng:didn't the boss tell you to do some work﹖ why are you sitting doing nothing﹖
